hero.slogan: Streamline HR: Automate Absences, Empower Teams
hero.subtext: Reduce admin time by 80%. Zero errors in balance calculations. Approval in less than 24 hours. 100% audit traceability.

features.title: Everything You Need to Manage HR Effortlessly
features.subtitle: Powerful features designed for modern teams
features.leaveDesc: Dynamic forms with automatic days calculation, half-day support, and smart conflict detection. Reduce admin time by 80% with automated approvals.
features.workflowDesc: Sequential or parallel approval chains with delegation support and automatic escalation. Adapt to any organizational structure.
features.dashboardDesc: Real-time KPIs, interactive graphs, and CSV/Excel export. Complete visibility into team availability and trends.
features.docAiDesc: OCR auto-import, intelligent classification, and automatic employee matching. Document AI handles the paperwork for you.
features.multiSiteDesc: Custom rules per office, multi-country compliance, and centralized management. One platform for your entire organization.
features.securityDesc: Two-factor authentication, AES-256 encryption, complete audit logs, and GDPR compliance. Your data is safe with us.

whyMeridio.title: Why Teams Choose Meridio
whyMeridio.subtitle: See how Meridio transforms HR management compared to traditional approaches
whyMeridio.trad1: Manual emails and spreadsheets lead to errors and delays
whyMeridio.edge1: Automates 100% of the cycle with zero errors and less than 24h approvals
whyMeridio.trad5: Standard security without full audit trails
whyMeridio.edge5: Enterprise-grade security with 2FA, AES-256 encryption, and complete traceability
whyMeridio.cta: Discover the Difference – Request a Demo

testimonials.title: What Our Users Say
testimonials.subtitle: Join thousands of satisfied teams worldwide
testimonials.t1Quote: Meridio saved us hours every week! The automated workflows eliminated our spreadsheet chaos completely.
testimonials.t2Quote: The AI document management is a game-changer. No more manual sorting and filing. Everything is automatic.
testimonials.t3Quote: We went from 3 days average approval time to under 4 hours. Our employees love the transparency.
testimonials.t4Quote: Managing leaves across 5 countries was a nightmare. Meridio made it seamless with multi-site rules.
